name: Three of Wands
summary: Synthesis, fertile growth in Fire. Creation takes shape, teamwork with the element.
flowText: Three of Wands is the wand of fire — Creation takes shape; teamwork with the element.

related.name: Queen of Wands
related.teaser: Queen of Wands is the wand of fire — Contain and cultivate; depth with discernment.

related.name: King of Wands
related.teaser: King of Wands is the wand of fire — Set order and direction; steward the realm.

related.name: Nine of Wands
related.teaser: Nine of Wands is the wand of fire — Satisfaction and sovereignty; inner harvest.

related.name: Seven of Wands
related.teaser: Seven of Wands is the wand of fire — Assess motive; clarity over confusion.

related.name: Four of Wands
related.teaser: Four of Wands is the wand of fire — Structure and rest; beware stagnation.

related.name: Five of Wands
related.teaser: Five of Wands is the wand of fire — Friction reveals truth; growth through test.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Page of Wands
related.teaser: Page of Wands is the wand of fire — Beginner’s mind; bring news and curiosity.

related.name: Ten of Wands
related.teaser: Ten of Wands is the wand of fire — Completion and consequence; passing the mantle.

related.name: Eight of Wands
related.teaser: Eight of Wands is the wand of fire — Skill and dedication; steady refinement.

related.name: Six of Wands
related.teaser: Six of Wands is the wand of fire — Reciprocity and grace; the current flows.

related.name: Ace of Wands
related.teaser: Ace of Wands is the wand of fire — Origin essence — the {flow_noun} offered by the unseen.
